overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking and running through a medieval European harbor town. The journey transitions from enclosed cobblestone courtyards and narrow timber-framed alleys to an open waterfront with a large stone bridge and harbor views.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval stone courtyard transitioning to narrow street

events.description: exits stone courtyard into narrow cobblestone passage between timber buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the town courtyard toward a narrow alleyway

notable_agents.action: villager in green tunic walking alongside the path

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the entrance to the courtyard
half-timbered medieval house with white plaster and dark wooden beams
stacked wooden barrels near the building wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a medieval stone courtyard with Geralt walking toward a narrow passage. Timber-framed buildings line the right side while a stone archway marks the entrance behind. The cobblestone ground is damp as the character moves through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered timber-framed alleyway with market stalls

events.description: passes under a covered wooden walkway connecting two buildings overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alley passing villagers and market stalls

notable_agents.action: woman in brown dress walking ahead of the character
villager standing near a wooden post observing the street

entered.detail: overhead wooden bridge structure connecting buildings across the street
clotheslines with fabric strung between buildings overhead
wooden market stall with goods displayed

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow covered alley with timber-framed buildings on both sides. Overhead wooden walkways and hanging laundry create a canopy effect. Villagers walk through the moderate crowd as the character passes under a connecting archway between buildings.

events.description: begins descending the stone stairs toward the harbor level

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs toward the waterfront with other townspeople

notable_agents.action: group of villagers gathered at the top of the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading down to the harbor area
tall stone towers and buildings visible in the distance above the stairs
construction scaffolding against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and descends a wide stone staircase leading down from the town center. Stone walls flank the stairs while distant castle towers rise above the harbor. The lighting becomes brighter as the character descends toward the open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with panoramic harbor view

events.description: exits narrow passage into open waterfront with view of large stone bridge and harbor
transitions from walking to running along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: running along the waterfront path while admiring the scenic view of the harbor and bridge

notable_agents.action: fisherman working on the wooden dock near the water

entered.detail: massive multi-arched stone bridge spanning the harbor with buildings atop it
calm water of the harbor with boats visible in the distance
cluster of buildings built into the rocky cliffside across the water
simple wooden post fence lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow stairs, the scene opens dramatically to a wide waterfront promenade. A massive stone bridge with multiple arches dominates the view across the harbor, with a cliffside town rising behind it. The character breaks into a run along the cobblestone path, passing a wooden fence and fishermen working on the docks.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy waterfront path with wooden docks

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy waterfront path passing wooden shacks and small docks

notable_agents.action: villager in simple clothing walking along the grassy path

entered.detail: small rustic wooden hut with thatched roof near the water's edge
small wooden rowboat moored near the dock
low stone wall lining the right side of the grassy path

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a grassy dirt path along the water's edge. Small wooden shacks and docks line the shore while the large stone bridge remains visible to the right. The character walks past a moored rowboat and a stone retaining wall, with the cliffside town now directly ahead across the calm harbor waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense medieval town that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit harbor landscape. It begins in a damp stone courtyard, moving past timber-framed buildings and through a narrow, covered alley where overhead walkways and hanging laundry create a claustrophobic canopy. As the character passes under a connecting archway, the scene shifts toward a wide stone staircase that descends from the town center, with the lighting brightening as distant castle towers emerge above the horizon. The view then opens dramatically onto a waterfront promenade, where the camera follows the character into a run past fishermen and a massive multi-arched stone bridge. Finally, the path transitions from cobblestone to a grassy dirt trail along the water's edge, passing moored rowboats and wooden shacks with the cliffside town looming ahead across the calm harbor.
